heroSection.title: Steel Doesn't Burn. Neither Should Your Home.
heroSection.subtitle: Custom non-combustible homes with 100% steel framing - factory-built in Santa Clara and installed on your lot in as fast as 90 days.
heroSection.backgroundImageAlt: Steel-framed non-combustible custom home built by Fast Struct in California

items.text: The temperature at which wood framing can ignite in a fire.
Steel framing doesn't ignite - it can't feed a fire the way wood does.
Every Fast Struct home is framed entirely in steel. No wood structure. Ever.

fireFacts.note: Material properties shown for general reference. Every project is engineered to site conditions and applicable California building codes.

valueProp.title: Built From a Material That Won't Feed a Fire.
texts: Most homes in California are framed in wood - the same material fires consume. Fast Struct builds differently. Every wall, floor, and roof structure we manufacture is cold-formed steel: non-combustible, dimensionally stable, and precision-cut to millimeter tolerances in our state-approved Santa Clara facility.
For homeowners in the wildland-urban interface, that isn't a spec-sheet detail. It's the difference between a structure that participates in a fire and one that doesn't.
Your lot, your design, your finishes - engineered for fire country.

image.alt: Precision steel Smart Wall panels manufactured in Fast Struct's Santa Clara facility

comparison.title: Wood Frame vs. Steel Frame
comparison.subtitle: In fire country, the material your home is built from is the single biggest decision you'll make.

wood.title: Typical Wood-Framed Home
rows: Combustible structure - framing can ignite and carry fire
Vulnerable to rot, termites, and moisture over time
Job-site framing tolerances vary crew to crew
Months of on-site construction, noise, and disruption

steel.title: Fast Struct Steel Home
rows: Non-combustible steel structure - it doesn't ignite or feed a fire
Immune to rot and termites; holds millimeter-level tolerances
Factory-controlled quality in a state-approved facility
Arrives up to 95% complete - installed in as fast as 90 days

companyOverview.title: Fast Struct: Steel Construction for California's Fire Country
texts: Fast Struct was built on a simple conviction: California homes should be faster to build and harder to destroy. So we moved construction into a state-approved factory in Santa Clara and switched the structure to steel.

As a licensed California contractor, we deliver complete A-Z solutions - design, permits, fabrication, and delivery - for custom homes and ADUs across the Bay Area and beyond, including parcels in designated fire hazard severity zones.
From your first call to the day you get your keys, one dedicated project manager handles everything. We're not just a builder. We're your partner in building something that lasts.

items.title: Licensed CA Contractor
items.text: Fully licensed, bonded, and insured - every build compliant and warrantied.

items.title: State-Approved Facility
items.text: Our Santa Clara factory routes plans through state approval for faster permits.

items.title: Complete A-Z Management
items.text: One dedicated project manager handles permits, design, fabrication, and delivery.

items.title: Steel - Built to Last
items.text: Non-combustible steel structure that resists rot, termites, and time itself.

processTimeline.title: From First Call to Keys - As Fast As 90 Days.

steps.title: Site & Risk Review
steps.description: We assess your lot, access, exposure, and goals - and recommend the right construction method for your parcel.

steps.title: Design & Permits
steps.description: Your floor plan, your finishes. As a state-approved factory, our plans route through state approval - permits in days, not months. Homes in fire hazard zones are engineered to the requirements that apply to your parcel.

steps.title: Factory Build
steps.description: Your home is precision-built in steel in our Santa Clara facility while your foundation is prepared on-site. Parallel, not sequential - that's how the timeline compresses.

steps.title: One-Day Install
steps.description: Modules arrive up to 95% complete and are craned into place - rapid, clean, and quiet for your neighbors.

steps.title: Handover
steps.description: Walk into a finished, non-combustible home. Keys in hand - not a punch list.

rebuild.title: If You've Lost a Home, Time Matters.
texts: Rebuilding shouldn't take years. Because your Fast Struct home is manufactured off-site while your lot is cleared and the foundation is prepared, the timeline compresses dramatically - and a dedicated project manager handles permits, approvals, and logistics from the first call to move-in.

bulletPoints.title: Factory-built off-site
bulletPoints.text: Your home takes shape in our facility while your property is being cleared.

bulletPoints.title: One dedicated project manager
bulletPoints.text: Permits, design, fabrication, and delivery - handled end to end.

bulletPoints.title: Fully custom design
bulletPoints.text: Rebuild the home you want, not a catalog box.

bulletPoints.title: Rebuilt in steel
bulletPoints.text: So you never have to make this call twice.

differentiators.title: Why Fire-Country Homeowners Choose Fast Struct

items.title: Steel Construction - Not Wood
items.text: Every Fast Struct home is built with a steel frame. Steel is non-combustible, doesn't rot, and holds millimeter-level tolerances. It's a fundamentally better building material - and one that 90% of our competitors simply can't offer.

items.title: As Fast As 90 Days
items.text: Off-site factory production runs in parallel with your on-site foundation work, compressing timelines no traditional builder can match.

items.title: State-Approved Facility = Faster Permits
items.text: As a state-certified modular factory, our plans go through the state approval route - permits in days, not months.

items.title: Fire-Smart Envelope Options
items.text: Non-combustible cladding, metal roofing, tempered dual-pane glazing, and ember-resistant detailing - configured to your parcel and code requirements.

items.title: Arrives 95% Complete
items.text: Your home is craned onto your property nearly finished. Installation takes a day, not months.

items.title: Complete A-Z Solutions
items.text: Permits, design, fabrication, and delivery all handled by one team. One point of contact, zero coordination stress.

items.title: Dedicated Project Manager
items.text: One person guides you personally from the first call to the day you're handed the keys.

items.title: Licensed CA Contractor + Certified Facility
items.text: Fully licensed, bonded, and compliant. Every build is warrantied and certified.

testimonials.quote: Fast Struct delivered our dream home in under 90 days. The quality is unreal. The steel construction feels so much more solid than wood.
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: The whole process was seamless. One project manager, clear steps, no surprises. They handled our tight driveway with their panelized system.
testimonials.author: Jason T.

testimonials.quote: Our ADU was craned into place in a single day. The neighbors couldn't believe it. Highly professional and efficient team.
testimonials.author: Linda R.
